title: The Tyre Corporation of India Limited (Disinvestment of Ownership) Act, 2007
full_text: The Tyre Corporation of India Limited (Disinvestment of Ownership) Act, 2007 टायर कारपोरेशन ऑफ इंडिया लिमिटेड (स्वामित्वका अपविनिधान) अधिनियम, 2007 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200750 Act Number: 50 Enactment Date: 2007-12-12 Act Year: 2007 Short Title: The Tyre Corporation of India Limited (Disinvestment of Ownership) Act, 2007 Hindi Title: टायर कारपोरेशन ऑफ इंडिया लिमिटेड (स्वामित्वका अपविनिधान) अधिनियम, 2007 Long Title: An Act to provide for disinvestment of Government's equity in the Tyre Corporation of India Limited and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Heavy Industries and Public Enterprises Department: Department of Heavy Industry Enforcement Date: 12-12-2007 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Tyre Corporation of India Limited (Disinvestment of Ownership) Act, 2007 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Disinvestment in the company. Section 3. Payment of consideration for disinvestment in the company. Section 4. Manner of disinvestment. Section 5. Provision in respect of officers and other employees of the company. Section 6. Act to have overriding effect.
